# Veilus
> Anti-detect browser with built-in automation platform. Native Chromium engine — 3x faster, 80% less RAM.

## Key Facts
- Free tier: 5 browser profiles forever, no credit card required
- Native engine built with Tauri + Rust (not Electron)
- Each profile has a unique fingerprint: Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, Client Hints (20+ parameters)
- Built-in automation: action recorder, visual canvas flow builder, AI agent (BYOK)
- End-to-end encrypted sync via Git or Google Drive
- Currently available on macOS; Windows and Linux expected Q2 2026

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://veilus.io): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [Download](https://veilus.io/download): Download Veilus for macOS
- [Documentation](https://docs.veilus.io): User guides, API reference
- [Blog](https://blog.veilus.io): Articles on anti-detect browsers, automation, privacy
- [Privacy Policy](https://veilus.io/privacy): Data collection and protection
- [Terms of Service](https://veilus.io/terms): Usage terms
- [Refund Policy](https://veilus.io/refund): Refund conditions

## Core Features
- Fingerprint Engine: 20+ browser parameters customized per profile
- VeilusFlow: Record actions → auto-generate YAML + Playwright scripts
- Visual Canvas: Drag-and-drop automation flow builder (low-code)
- VeilusSync: Hierarchical end-to-end encrypted profile sync
- Scheduling: Hourly/daily/weekly automation with missed-run catch-up
- AI Agent: BYOK (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) for DOM analysis and auto-execution

## Pricing
- Free: 5 profiles, basic fingerprinting
- Starter ($15/mo): 50 profiles, automation
- Pro ($49/mo): 200 profiles, team features
- Business ($99/mo): Unlimited profiles, API access, priority support
